message:
New Crowdin updates (#1314)

* New translations cards.json (French)

* New translations cards.json (Spanish)

* New translations common.json (Spanish)

* New translations cards.json (German)

* New translations common.json (German)

* New translations cards.json (Italian)

* New translations common.json (Italian)

* New translations cards.json (Japanese)

* New translations common.json (Japanese)

* New translations cards.json (Portuguese)

* New translations common.json (Portuguese)

* New translations cards.json (Chinese Simplified)

* New translations common.json (Chinese Simplified)

* New translations cards.json (Hindi)

* New translations common.json (Hindi)

* New translations common.json (Spanish)

* New translations common.json (German)

* New translations common.json (Italian)

* New translations common.json (Japanese)

* New translations common.json (Portuguese)

* New translations common.json (Chinese Simplified)

* New translations common.json (Hindi)

* New translations common.json (French)

@@ -251,7 +251,8 @@

   },

@@ -2548,5 +2550,21 @@
     "acrossClusters": "across {{count}} clusters",
     "acrossClusters_one": "across {{count}} cluster",
     "acrossClusters_other": "across {{count}} clusters"
+  },
+  "flatcar": {
+    "healthy": "Healthy",
+    "degraded": "Degraded",
+    "totalNodes": "Flatcar Nodes",
+    "updating": "Updating",
+    "outdated": "Outdated",
+    "versionDistribution": "Version Distribution",

+    "noFlatcarNodes": "No Flatcar nodes found",
+    "noFlatcarNodesHint": "No nodes running Flatcar Container Linux detected.",
+    "fetchError": "Failed to fetch Flatcar node status",
+    "syncedJustNow": "just now",
+    "syncedMinutesAgo": "{{count}}m ago",
+    "syncedHoursAgo": "{{count}}h ago",
+    "syncedDaysAgo": "{{count}}d ago"
   }
 }

@@ -2717,5 +2717,41 @@ "emptyStateDescription": "Add games to your arcade! Choose from Kubernetes-themed classics like Flappy Pod, Container Tetris, and more.", "addGames": "Add Games", "dragToReorder": "Drag to reorder" + }, + "testPages": { + "unifiedCardTest": { + "gapHeaderStatsBadge": "Header stats badge - Legacy shows \"168 issues\" count badge", + "gapRestartCountFormat": "Restart count format - Shows \"6.3K\" vs legacy \"6260 restarts\"", + "gapMultiStatusDisplay": "Multi-status display - Shows single status vs CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled", + "gapRowLayout": "Row layout - Simpler layout vs legacy CardListItem with metadata", + "featureHookRegistration": "Hook registration - registerUnifiedHooks() called in main.tsx", + "featureDataFetching": "Data fetching - useCachedPodIssues loads 168 issues", + "featurePagination": "Pagination - Page navigation works correctly", + "featureTextSearch": "Text search - Filters items as you type", + "featureClusterFilter": "Cluster filter - Dropdown filters by cluster", + "featureRenderers": "Renderers - cluster-badge, status-badge, number renderers work", + "featureCardAIActions": "CardAIActions - Diagnose/Repair buttons on each list item (hover to reveal)", + "featureSorting": "Sorting - Sort by field with ascending/descending toggle", + "featureCustomVisualization": "Custom visualization - Loads components from cardRegistry by name", + "featureDashboardAddCard": "Dashboard AddCard modal - UnifiedDashboard opens AddCardModal for adding cards", + "featureDashboardConfigureCard": "Dashboard ConfigureCard modal - UnifiedDashboard opens ConfigureCardModal for editing" + }, + "unifiedDashboardTest": { + "featureUnifiedCard": "UnifiedCard - Renders from config (list, table, chart, status-grid)", + "featureUnifiedCardAdapter": "UnifiedCardAdapter - Bridge for gradual migration", + "featureUnifiedDashboard": "UnifiedDashboard - Config-driven dashboard layout", + "featureModals": "Modals - AddCardModal, ConfigureCardModal integrated", + "featureMigrationUtilities": "Migration utilities - Analyzer, validator, reporter", + "pendingDataHooks": "Data hooks - Some hooks need registration", + "pendingCardValidation": "Card validation - Verify each card works correctly" + }, + "unifiedStatsTest": { + "featureSameGetStatValueInterface": "Same getStatValue interface - Both use (blockId: string) => StatBlockValue", + "featureSameStatBlocks": "Same stat blocks - Both render from COMPUTE_STAT_BLOCKS definitions", + "featureCollapsibleSections": "Collapsible sections - Both support expand/collapse", + "featureConfigurationModal": "Configuration modal - Both have settings to show/hide stats", + "featureDemoIndicator": "Demo indicator - Both show demo badge when data.isDemo=true", + "gapConfigSource": "Config source - Unified uses converted configs, legacy uses raw definitions" + } } }
